title: Creamy Monterey Jack Gratin
description: A rich and creamy gratin dish made with Monterey Jack cheese, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Butter the bottom and sides of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange 4-6 slices of French bread in the bottom of the dish.
Sprinkle 1/2 cup of Monterey Jack cheese over the bread.
Dot the top of the cheese with creamy cheese.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Sprinkle zesty cheese over the top of the gratin.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Broil the gratin for 1-2 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
